summary: Vertical handheld interview filmed outdoors next to a television broadcast set with green dome awnings and visible lighting rigs and cameras. The subject is a woman with short grey hair wearing a red t-shirt printed 'DOORDASH GRANDMA,' holding a phone, a wallet, and a water bottle while she answers questions. A large ornate building is visible in the background of later frames. The spoken audio, in English, has her describing earning about eleven thousand dollars in tips the prior year and discussing the removal of tax on tips and a cancer treatment; the tweet text is in Spanish. No on-screen graphics or music.

script.scene: Close vertical shot of a woman in a red 'DOORDASH GRANDMA' shirt holding a phone and wallet, broadcast lighting and green awnings behind her.
Same subject, wider, with a large ornate building and a seated crew member visible behind the broadcast set.
